hotels.name: The Willow Inn
hotels.description: Cosy village inn a short stroll from the venue. Mention the wedding for a group rate.

hotels.name: Placeholder Manor Hotel
hotels.description: Larger country hotel with a spa, ideal if you're making a weekend of it.

hotels.name: Budget Stays Placeholder
hotels.description: Reliable budget option near the motorway junction.

transport.name: By train
transport.description: Placeholder Station is the nearest stop, 10 minutes from the venue by taxi. Trains run hourly from the city.

transport.name: By taxi
transport.description: Local firms know the venue well — book your return journey in advance, especially after midnight.

transport.name: By car
transport.description: The venue is 5 minutes from junction 12. Follow signs for Placeholder Village, then Willow Lane.

parking: Free parking is available in the field beside the venue. Cars may be left overnight but must be collected by 10am the next morning.
